rejection_reason: tone: forbidden_word — 'best-in-class' and 'next-generation' appear in body copy. Both are banned as unsubstantiated superlatives. Replace with a specific, verifiable customer outcome.
text:
Subject: {{company}}'s productivity stack, {{first_name}}

Hey {{first_name}},

I noticed {{company}} recently expanded the team — a great signal of growth.

FlowAI offers best-in-class AI automation powered by next-generation workflow technology. Our best-in-class integrations connect with the tools your team already uses, and our next-generation AI learns your team's patterns over time.

Would it be worth a 15-minute call to see {{company}}'s best-in-class setup?

[Signature]

FlowAI · 123 Main St, San Francisco CA 94105 · Unsubscribe
